stemHtml: The term "Maximum Zero Fuel Mass" (MZFM) consists of…

options.a: the maximum mass for some aeroplanes including the Fuel Load and the Traffic Load.
options.b: the maximum mass authorized for a certain aeroplane not including Traffic Load and Fuel Load.
options.c: the maximum permissible mass of an aeroplane with NO usable fuel.
options.d: the maximum mass authorized for a certain aeroplane not including the fuel load and operational items.
